content.en:
Year after year passed, Ye Tian spent time hunting the Forbidden Zerg and cultivating, his cultivation became higher and higher, and the power of the physical body, the forbidden Dao power, and the soul power became stronger and stronger.

In the blink of an eye, it is 3,000 years.

In these 3,000 years, a large number of Dao Ancestors have fallen, but there are also a large number of Dao Ancestors who have risen, and even the newly promoted Invincible Dao Ancestors have as many as six, one of which is the Wind King.

The Wind King accumulated a lot of money, and used the sacrifice of a large number of forbidden Zerg corpses to break the shackles in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm in one fell swoop, and was promoted to become an invincible Dao Ancestor, and his strength instantly surpassed before.

In addition, there are many new Dao Ancestors, so that the number of Dao Ancestors in the major bases has not decreased, and it has almost maintained a stable state.

The only thing that made the Dao Ancestors helpless was that the Forbidden Zerg reproduced too fast, and they killed nearly 10 million Forbidden Zerg, which was already comparable to the total number of the Forbidden Zerg at the beginning, but the Forbidden Zerg still had more than 10 million numbers, almost inexhaustible.

Moreover, the number of commander-level forbidden zergs has also returned to more than fifty, and the number of lord-level taboo zergs has not increased again.

But for the major bases, the pressure and the opportunity are equal.

In this short period of 3,000 years, the Dao Ancestors have improved more than the previous 300,000 years, so for the strong, the Dark Forbidden Domain is indeed a good place to temper.

Moreover, due to the sacrifice of a large number of forbidden Zerg in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, even if many Dao Ancestors were rewarded with some origin power, the power of their own origin was still growing, at least several times stronger than at the beginning.

You must know that it is very difficult for the Ancient Realm to grow, and it almost takes a long time, and it has grown several times in just a few thousand years, what a terrifying growth rate.

At this rate of growth, it may not be long before the Xuanxu Ancient Realm can be promoted to the Ancient Realm.

......

this day.

Ye Xingchen came with the news, which made Ye Tian very excited.

"Xingchen has actually broken through to the Supreme Dao Ancestor level!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Moreover, he was very aware of his son's cultivation situation, and it was only when he reached his current limit that he finally chose to break through and become a supreme Dao Ancestor.

However, Ye Xingchen did not comprehend the Forbidden Dao Technique, but he comprehended a Extreme Dao Technique, which can be regarded as very remarkable.

He didn't ask Ye Xingchen too much, after all, Ye Xingchen didn't have a forbidden talent, and if he wanted to realize the forbidden Dao technique at the level of the Seventh Heavenly Dao Ancestor, it would be too difficult!

But even so, as soon as Ye Xingchen broke through to the Supreme Dao Ancestor, his strength was also above that of ordinary Supreme Dao Ancestors, which was comparable to a Supreme Dao Ancestor like the Fire King.

And after Ye Xingchen broke through to become the strongest Dao Ancestor, he soon became one of the ten kings of Black Wind Mountain, and took over the title of Earth King.

As for Xiao Yue, Ye Yu, and Ye Xingyue, they were all already the ultimate powerhouses of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and their combat power was very strong.

Ye Tian's improvement is also relatively large, Ye Tian's forbidden Dao power, physical power, and soul power are much stronger than when he first broke through to the strongest Dao Ancestor, this is the result of his cultivation and improvement by using a large number of forbidden strange objects and some treasures of Black Wind Mountain.

According to Ye Tian's estimation, if he fights with a powerful Dao Ancestor like the Fire King now, it is estimated that one move can severely damage him, and it is enough to kill him within a few moves, even if it is a weaker invincible Dao Ancestor, he can compete with one or two, and if he can't beat the other party, the other party doesn't want to kill him.

What made Ye Tian happiest was the development of the human race, for example, Ye Tian's Nine Extremes Legion, which was now constantly cultivating in the Forbidden Void Realm, and the progress was too great, after all, the Forbidden Void Realm had a thousand times the passage of time, and a thousand times more cultivation time than others.

In addition, Ye Tian has continuously improved some forbidden and strange things that he can't use over the years, and occasionally rewards the forbidden Zerg and asks the people of the Nine Extremes Legion to sacrifice.

Today, the hundreds of thousands of members of the Nine Extremes Legion are all above the True Ancestors, among which the Invincible True Ancestors already have ten, the Supreme True Ancestors have tens of thousands, and almost all the others are Elite True Ancestors.

At the Dao Ancestor level, the Nine Extremes Legion also has hundreds, and almost all of them are powerhouses above the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the strongest has cultivated to the Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor level.

This is the current situation of the Nine Poles Legion!

The number of Dao Ancestors of the Human Race is even greater, there are already thousands, much more than the Dao Ancestors of the Middle Triple Heaven Forces, and even more than the Dao Ancestors of some of the Seventh Heaven Forces.

However, Ye Tian didn't have much investment in the other Dao Ancestors of the Human Race, so their ascension speed was not fast, and they basically belonged to the level of Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestors or Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

this day.

Ye Tian was hunting the Forbidden Zerg in the Dark Forbidden Domain, and suddenly received a summons.

"The Void Ancient Realm gave birth to a medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm!!"

After Ye Tian heard the news, he also hurriedly returned to the Black Wind Mountain base.

Black Wind Mountain Base.

Ye Tian, Ye Xingchen, Fire King, Ice King, Time King, and Wood King all sat down one by one, and the Wind King, who had become an invincible Dao Ancestor, that is, the Xuanfeng Dao Ancestor today, also participated in this meeting with the Flowing Fire Dao Ancestor and other invincible Dao Ancestors.

Presiding over the meeting were the Half-Step Domain Ancestor Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor.

At the meeting, the Eternal Dao Ancestor spoke: "Presumably you have all received the news that a medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm was indeed born in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and the value of a medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm far exceeds that of a small Forbidden Void Realm. Once a force obtains the medium-sized forbidden void realm, the supreme Dao Ancestor, the invincible Dao Ancestor, and even the half-step domain ancestor can enter it to cultivate, although there is no effect of time passing and accelerating, the cultivation environment of the medium-sized forbidden void realm is too good, and once the medium-sized forbidden void realm is controlled, it is almost impossible to be broken, so the forces that control the medium-sized forbidden void realm can hardly be destroyed. Therefore, the major forces will compete for the medium-sized Forbidden Void Realm. "

The Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor also added: "This time, due to the Forbidden Zerg incident, we, the Half-Step Domain Ancestors, are not allowed to participate in the battle for the Forbidden Void Realm, otherwise it will be easy for the Forbidden Zerg to take the opportunity to attack the major bases, and even enter the Dao Mountain Realm." In addition, the invincible Dao Ancestors also need to contend with the commander-level forbidden zerg, and they must not leave. I hope that you, the invincible Dao Ancestors, will not go without permission. Several of our half-step domain ancestors have discussed, if there is an invincible Dao Ancestor who intrudes into that forbidden void realm without permission, the half-step domain ancestors will join forces to fight! In short, at most, only the strongest Dao Ancestors are allowed to compete, which force has the ability to snatch the forbidden void realm, then which force will belong to it!"

Those invincible Dao Ancestors were more disappointed when they heard that they couldn't compete, after all, even if they couldn't snatch the Forbidden Void Realm, they could snatch a large number of forbidden strange things, and even snatch the Forbidden Treasure.

The Forbidden Treasure is also an incomparably precious thing to them.

However, the half-step domain ancestors all said so, and they didn't dare to disobey it, so they could only agree one by one.
